bioText: Welcome to the home page of my personal portfolio! I am a senior at the University of Washington, pursuing an Electrical & Computer Engineering degree with a concentration in VLSI. This site serves as a meeting point for all of personal projects, creative ideas, academic coursework, and professional experiences. Take a look at my plane-tracking antenna project in the "projects" section, or tune into some of my self-released music in the "music" tab. I have a lot to share, so have fun exploring! And if you have any questions, I would love to connect.
